findings.detail: Only imports: config.settings (ShadowSettings) — configuration dependency. No imports from pipeline/. No imports from sibling shadow modules beyond config. Clean isolation.

Ranking engine operates on ShadowPerformance objects provided by caller. Beta exclusion is enforced upstream in shadow_state.get_ranking_eligible_shadows(). The engine itself is shadow-type-agnostic and computes mathematically on whatever performances it receives. This is correct separation of concerns — data filtering at DB layer, computation at engine layer.

V2 composite weights (0.30 MPPM + 0.20 Calmar + 0.15 Omega + 0.15 WR + 0.20 Calibration) correctly fall back to v1 config weights when no calibration data. Career-day-aware dynamic WR line (early boost, mature relaxation) with domain/type adjustments. Profitability penalty, abstention penalty, quota efficiency bonus — all composited transparently with modifiers dict.

_apply_holm_bonferroni() corrects for multiple comparisons in achievement tier assignment. With 22 shadows, uncorrected probability of at least one false ELITE is ~97%. Step-down correction with alpha=0.05 family-wise error rate. Only downgrades, never upgrades.

Primary entry: rank_shadows() — full pipeline from metrics to ranked results. Supporting: compute_composite_score(), compute_haircut(), determine_achievement_tier(), detect_plateau(), check_reset_eligibility(). Each has clear single responsibility.
